subject: [PATCH v5 4/4] cleanup: Remove NULL check from unconditional guards

reviews.author: Peter Zijlstra (Intel)
reviews.summary: The commit was merged into the locking/core branch of tip, indicating that it has passed some level of review but may still require further refinement or testing before being applied to the mainline kernel.

2026-06-03.patch_summary: This patch removes unnecessary NULL checks from unconditional lock guards in the Linux kernel, simplifying code and reducing potential crashes.
